# Performance Analytics Reporter (Uplizd) - Automated QR code campaign insights

## Summary
The Performance Analytics Reporter is an intelligent Uplizd workflow that aggregates QR code engagement metrics from Beaconstac to provide actionable campaign insights. By automating the retrieval and analysis of scan data, marketing teams can eliminate manual reporting, maintain a single source of truth for campaign performance, and accelerate data-driven decision-making.

---
